pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-K-001 (LS, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4222 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.422, nice=0.411, eu_ai_act=0.402) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4222 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-K-001 (composite 0.4222) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4222 for LS domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Bioinformatics Technician at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.4222 is not a standard requirement for Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4222, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
